request: Replace the hardcoded triage track templates and the harness's sequential phase walker with a `.claude/workflows.jsonl`-driven track-graph executor. Tracks are DAGs of skill-invocation nodes with depends_on/blocks/can_parallel/sub_track/alternates/preconditions semantics. Selector nodes pick among alternates based on declarative preconditions. Triage becomes an LLM-driven track selector that presents picked + alternate tracks via AskUserQuestion. Harness becomes a graph executor with sub-track expansion and parallel-cluster dispatch. swarm-plan emits a runtime sub-track to .claude/state/swarm/<slug>.jsonl which the harness reloads as a runtime overlay. Article IV is amended to be the meta-rule governing what workflows.jsonl can declare (invariants every track must satisfy). A one-shot migrator transforms pre-§17 workflow.json files. A new /init-project doctor sub-command detects + fixes baseline drift. Dogfood retrofit: the current four hardcoded templates + the cli-copy-review insertion + the swarm-vs-tdd alternates all land as records in the initial workflows.jsonl. Convention codified: user-shipped tooling lives under .claude/ except CLAUDE.md and .mcp.json.
